LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 301, AS TO THE FEB-06-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF HECTOR ZAMORA, AN INDIVIDUAL, AND IN A REPRESENTATIVE CAPACITY ON BEHALF OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND OTHER AGGRIEVED EMPLOYEES' MOTION REQUESTING DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF HECTOR ZAMORA HAS FILED AN UNOPPOSED MOTION TO DISMISS THIS ACTION. THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION. PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE PAGA CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL PAGA CLAIM AND HIS INDIVIDUAL WAGE AND HOUR CLAIMS ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion Requesting Dismissal Of Entire Action
Off Calendar Feb-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF HECTOR ZAMORA , AN INDIVIDUAL, AND IN A REPRESENTATIVE CAPACITY ON BEHALF OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND OTHER AGGRIEVED EMPLOYEES' Motion Requesting Dismissal Of Entire Action.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Hector Zamora has filed an unopposed motion to dismiss this action. The court grants the motion. Plaintiff's representative PAGA claim is dismissed without prejudice. Plaintiff's individual PAGA claim and his individual wage and hour claims are dismissed with prejudice.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2024 Set For Trial On Dec-08-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
